_comment: PLACEHOLDER ONLY — NOT the source of truth. The release-gate job in .github/workflows/ci.yml regenerates this file from real cargo-audit / cargo-deny / npm-audit output on every main build and REJECTS any committed file whose source is not 'ci-generated-from-scanner-output'. Do not hand-edit counts to pass the gate; fix the underlying advisory or document an exception in .cargo/audit.toml / deny.toml.
